description: Huge model of a begging letter. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. From one who boasts to have belonged to ‘the owners of money’ (aṣḥāb al-amwāl) and became one of those who lost their riches (מיורדים מנכסיהם). Written on a bifolium. One of the pages has Ezekiel 1, another has love poetry in Judaeo-Arabic. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: נוסח גדול של מכתב קבצנות; בעברית ויהודית-ערבית; ממי שהיה עשיר ואיבד את כספו; כתוב על דיפלואה
